projects.title: Noktos — Invoices & Wallet Dashboards
projects.description: User-facing dashboards aligned with operational and financial workflows. Backend services and internal APIs with billing modules and Facturama integration; persistence via AWS S3/Storage.

projects.title: Dictamigos / Elite Coach — Client Management Platform
projects.description: Platform to manage clients, schedules, routines, reminders and payments. REST API built from scratch with Node.js/Express and SQL database; Google API email notifications; Mercado Pago validation.

projects.title: Hacktion 2024 (Notion) — REST API Integration
projects.description: REST API with Node.js/Express to connect Git with Notion, including secure token handling and endpoint validation.

projects.title: Instructor — Web Development Fundamentals
projects.description: Delivered a web development course covering HTML/JavaScript/CSS and API consumption fundamentals.

projects.title: Quiniela — Sports Prediction App
projects.description: Full-stack sports quiniela app where users can register, make match predictions and track standings in real time. Backend powered by Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime) and deployed on Vercel.

projects.title: Spotify Music Dashboard
projects.description: Personal music analytics dashboard integrated with the Spotify API. Displays top artists, top tracks, recently played history, playlists and currently playing track — all with time-range filters and OAuth login.
